chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No.339 of 2021 Ghulam Haider Versus Province of Sindh & others ______________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 1366/21 2. For orders on office objections 18,19, 27 3. For orders on CMA 1367/21 4. For hearing of main case. Dated: 19.01.2021 Mr. Niaz Ali Rawat K. Magsi for petitioner. -.-.- Petitioner has filed this petition for enforcement of an office order dated 02.03.2012 in terms whereof he was appointed as Chowkidar. It is claimed that though the appointment letter was issued but he was never paid salary since 2012. This could hardly be a ground for consideration since this petition suffers from serious laches. Petitioner could have availed the remedy at the time when either the appointment letter was issued or the salary was refused, however, he failed to avail the remedy at the relevant time. Consequently such petition after a delay of almost nine years cannot be entertained which is accordingly dismissed with no order as to costs along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE
